overview: Ice Giant Spider is a Normal-class Beast/Giant/Insect monster found in Ice Abyss, Ice Cavern. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 80 HP, 22 physical damage, 250 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 5. 2 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack2 Jumping Spider at 160% ratio (352 base damage). Sight range 1100, combat radius 60.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 2 melee attacks. Attack1 Bite (140%), Attack2 Jumping Spider (160%).

phases.name: Rush / Charge
phases.description: 1 rush/charge attacks for gap-closing. Attack2 Jumping Spider (160%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Spider Web
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Spider Web icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Fire
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-3000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1100 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1100 units, loses target at 1300 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 60, ability check distance 160
strategies.description: Combat area radius 60. Ability check distance 160.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1100 units. Loses target at 1300 units.
